content.query:
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE [dbo].[dim_crane_terminal]
(
    [Cranes]     NVARCHAR(50),
    [Berth]      NVARCHAR(50),
    [Terminal]   NVARCHAR(50),
    [Client_Key] INT
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'dimension/dim_crane_terminal',
    DATA_SOURCE = [workinstruction],
    FILE_FORMAT = [DeltaFormat]
)



CREATE  or ALTER VIEW wi_allterminals AS 
SELECT * 
FROM OPENROWSET( 
    BULK 'gold/WI_AllTerminals', 
    data_source = 'workinstruction', 
    FORMAT = 'DELTA' 
) AS Main


GO


CREATE  or ALTER  VIEW rehandle_forecast_allTerminal AS 
SELECT Main.* 
FROM OPENROWSET( 
    BULK 'gold/wi_rehandle_forecast_test', 
    data_source = 'workinstruction', 
    FORMAT = 'DELTA' 
) AS Main
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT 
        client_id,
        MAX(source_file_name_sort) AS max_file_sort
    FROM OPENROWSET( 
        BULK 'gold/wi_rehandle_forecast_test', 
        data_source = 'workinstruction', 
        FORMAT = 'DELTA' 
    ) AS Sub
    GROUP BY client_id
) AS LatestFiles
ON Main.client_id = LatestFiles.client_id 
AND Main.source_file_name_sort = LatestFiles.max_file_sort;
